title: Claude Code
html: Stub. Anthropic's CLI coding agent. Yahir uses it as a primary coding partner across Rankett development; auto-generates multi-day handoff docs (2026 02 04 screenshot 2026 02 04 at 5 17 23 pm fddff4fb). Browser-tab context shows it permanently pinned alongside Claude and Supabase (2026 03 02 screenshot 2026 03 02 at 1 10 38 am 5d2c4c60).

related.label: Browser tab strip — Austin Treasure Map among Rankett tabs
YouTube-tool handoff doc generated by Claude Code
